description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story hostel building with a flat roof and a simple, modern design. The exterior walls are smooth and painted in a light gray or white color, featuring a regular grid of rectangular windows on both long facades. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms separated by white partition walls and several brown doors, suggesting individual dormitory or guest rooms. There is a larger open area near one end, possibly a communal space, and a section with a different floor texture that may represent a utility or storage area. The main entrance is marked by a set of large glass double doors on one of the long sides, flanked by windows. The overall appearance is functional and minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements or balconies.
description: A modern, rectangular two-story hostel with a flat roof, light exterior, and regularly spaced windows. The interior features multiple rooms, brown doors, and a prominent glass main entrance.
description_view_0: Shows the long facade with multiple windows, the main glass entrance, and a clear view of the interior room layout with brown doors.
description_view_1: Displays the short side of the building with no windows, highlighting the internal partition walls and a single brown door near the back.
description_view_2: Presents the opposite long facade with windows and a visible communal or utility area inside, as well as the main entrance.
description_view_3: Shows the other short side, again windowless, with a view into the interior rooms and a section with shelving or storage.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is located on the long facade and consists of a large, central glass double door set within a wide frame. The entrance is flush with the building's exterior, with no visible steps, ramps, or canopies. The doors are transparent and framed in metal, providing a modern and accessible look.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are rectangular, evenly spaced, and arranged in two horizontal rows on each long facade. Each window is of similar size and style, with simple frames and no decorative elements. The short sides of the building have no windows.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary, with a focus on minimalism and functional design.
